tasks.title: Stabilize current agent
tasks.description: Verify and harden current chat, stream, model provider registration, session lifecycle, and trace panel before adding new abstractions.

tasks.title: Add project-owned contracts
tasks.description: Add AgentSpec, ToolSpec, GuardrailResult, RunNode, RunGraph, ContextPack, and AgentTask dataclasses in harness/contracts.py without changing existing API behavior.

tasks.title: Trace tree and RunGraph snapshot
tasks.description: Store each current linear agent phase as RunNode data and add GET /agent/runs/{trace_id}/graph while preserving the old trace endpoint.

tasks.title: ToolSpec permissions and confirmation
tasks.description: Unify built-in and MCP tools behind ToolSpec, add parameter schema validation, timeout, permission levels, and confirmation requirements.

tasks.title: Guardrails
tasks.description: Add input, tool, and output guardrail stages with pass/warn/block results and trace-visible failures.

tasks.title: ContextPack and visible memory
tasks.description: Introduce structured ContextPack sections with source metadata and token budget, then add visible/editable memory in the client.

tasks.title: AgentTask durable execution
tasks.description: Add long-running AgentTask lifecycle, checkpoints, cancel/resume endpoints, and a QML task inbox.

tasks.title: Replay and regression evals
tasks.description: Create replay/eval infrastructure that checks trace shape, tool calls, guardrail behavior, and latency instead of exact model text.

tasks.title: AgentSpec templates
tasks.description: Add reusable agent specs for researcher, writer, reviewer, support, and knowledge curator with model/tool/memory policies.

tasks.title: Multi-agent handoffs
tasks.description: Add internal AgentMessage, handoff nodes, and first controlled crew/flow templates after single-agent reliability is proven.

tasks.title: A2A-ready interoperability
tasks.description: Add AgentCard and remote-agent placeholder contracts so MemoChat can later participate in agent-to-agent ecosystems safely.
